claims.statement: The Premed syllabus includes scientific method and laboratory practice; mathematics and statistics; physics; general chemistry; organic chemistry; biochemistry; biology and genetics; human structure and physiology; microbiology and immunology; behaviour, society, and population health; and integration and capstone work.
claims.scope: EmbeddedKnowledge Premed curriculum version 1.1 candidate, including its common core, medicine-facing bridge, route-specific behavioural material or supplied primer, and integration work.
claims.uncertainty: Behavioural and social depth varies by selected route; the welcome names the subject area without presenting every route-specific module as portable common core.

claims.statement: Within the recommended Premed journey, inquiry and quantitative reasoning support later evidence use; chemical, physical, biological, organic, and biochemical foundations prepare later work with human systems, infection, immunity, behaviour, populations, and unfamiliar capstone problems.
claims.scope: Instructional dependencies and medicine-facing uses declared in the EmbeddedKnowledge syllabus, not universal admissions prerequisites.
claims.uncertainty: Some modules may run concurrently, and institution-specific prerequisite sequences can differ.

claims.statement: The recommended sequence begins with the welcome and scientific inquiry, develops chemistry, biology, and physics, then organic chemistry and biochemistry, continues through a medicine-facing bridge and a selected route, and ends with integration and capstone work.
claims.scope: Recommended module order in EmbeddedKnowledge Premed curriculum version 1.1 candidate.
claims.uncertainty: The syllabus permits concurrent modules and pace variation after shared prerequisites.

claims.statement: Premed uses explanation, retrieval, modelling, problem solving, physical or simulated investigations, supplied datasets or observations, feedback, retry, and accessibility alternatives; only physical work demonstrates hands-on actions, so practical modality is reported.
claims.scope: Course learning design, practical curriculum, accessibility provisions, and recovery rules in the syllabus.
claims.uncertainty: The exact available physical activities and accommodations depend on delivery context and approved safety conditions.

claims.statement: The Premed destination is to explain, model, investigate, and integrate foundational science, using evidence and communicating limits in unfamiliar but bounded problems.
claims.scope: The course promise, program-level outcomes, WEL-000 purpose, and capstone destination in the syllabus.
claims.uncertainty: This is the intended curricular destination; demonstrated completion still depends on later course evidence and does not follow from finishing the welcome lesson.

claims.statement: The welcome is a motivating orientation rather than a prior-science gate, and Premed completion does not itself grant university credit, admission, clinical competence, or professional authority.
claims.scope: WEL-000 completion evidence and syllabus completion interpretation.
